creator: jaraco@jaraco.com
text:
I respect the change allowing a user to manually copy the vmware-server
distribution to distfiles.  However, that file is 100MB, and a
significant overkill in order to retrieve the vmware tools, which _may_
be accessible to the machine via the virtual CD ROM.  I'd like to
propose that the port allow for three options:

 

(1)     Mount the VMWare tools CD as is done in the VMWare Workstation
port.

(2)     Copy the VMWare Server tools .tgz distribution manually to
$DISTFILES

(3)     Copy the full VMWare Server distribution manually to $DISTFILES.

 

The last option is the least preferable if either of the former two
options are available.

 

I'm not very comfortable either with the port creation process or the
scripting itself, so I hope someone else may be interested in
implementing my suggestion.

 

Jason
